name: Cleartext Storage of Sensitive Information in the Registry
description: The product stores sensitive information in cleartext in the Windows registry. Attackers who can access the registry key can read the sensitive data, even if basic encoding is applied.
detection_pattern: Look for STORAGE nodes (registry write, registry key set) receiving sensitive data from INGRESS or TRANSFORM nodes without a TRANSFORM mediator (encryption) that protects the data before it is written to the registry.
